name: Jellied Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in cold water for 2 minutes.
2. Add boiling water and stir to dissolve gelatin.
3. Chill until it becomes the consistency of egg white.
4. Combine potatoes, onion, ham, cheese, and egg in a bowl.
5. In a separate bowl, mix vinegar, pepper, celery seed, mayonnaise, mustard, and yogurt.
6. Add the mixture from step 5 to the potato mixture and toss well to coat.
7. Beat the gelatin mixture until fluffy.
8. Combine with the potato mixture and pour into a 2-3 cup mold or bowl.
9. Chill until set.
10. Unmold and garnish with sliced cucumber on lettuce leaves.
Serving suggestion: Terrific picnic item. Take along a few breadsticks and a raw vegetable for munching.
